languages.text: "Этот мир терзал нас много Призывов, Лорд-капитан. Наконец-то мы получили приказ атаковать в ответ. Хотела бы я быть там".
"This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."
languages.original_text: "Этот мир терзал нас много Призывов, Лорд-капитан. Наконец-то мы получили приказ атаковать в ответ. Хотела бы я быть там".

traits.locale_text: "This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."
"This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."
"This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."

languages.text: 「この世界は、多くのコールアップで我々を苦しめてきました。ついに反撃の命令が下されました。私もそこにいたい」
languages.original_text: "This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."

traits.locale_text: 「この世界は、多くのコールアップで我々を苦しめてきました。ついに反撃の命令が下されました。私もそこにいたい」

languages.text: «Este mundo ha atormentado a muchas generaciones de llamados, Lord Capitán. Por fin recibimos la orden de devolverle el golpe. Ojalá estuviera allí».
languages.original_text: "This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."

traits.locale_text: «Este mundo ha atormentado a muchas generaciones de llamados, Lord Capitán. Por fin recibimos la orden de devolverle el golpe. Ojalá estuviera allí».

languages.text: “这个世界折磨了我们数个征召周期，舰长大人。现在我们终于接到反击的命令了。真希望我能亲赴前线作战。”
languages.original_text: "This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."

traits.locale_text: “这个世界折磨了我们数个征召周期，舰长大人。现在我们终于接到反击的命令了。真希望我能亲赴前线作战。”

languages.text: "Diese Welt hat uns viele Einberufungen lang gequält, Lord Captain. Endlich haben wir den Befehl, zurückzuschlagen. Ich wünschte, ich könnte dort sein."
languages.original_text: "This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Welt hat uns viele Einberufungen lang gequält, Lord Captain. Endlich haben wir den Befehl, zurückzuschlagen. Ich wünschte, ich könnte dort sein."

languages.text: "Bu dünya bize birçok Sevk Grubu'nda eziyet etti Lord Kaptan. Sonunda karşılık verme emrini aldık. Keşke orada olabilseydim."
languages.original_text: "This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."

traits.locale_text: "Bu dünya bize birçok Sevk Grubu'nda eziyet etti Lord Kaptan. Sonunda karşılık verme emrini aldık. Keşke orada olabilseydim."

languages.text: « Ce monde nous a tourmentés lors de nombreuses Mobilisations, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous avons enfin reçu l'ordre de riposter. J'aimerais pouvoir en être. »
languages.original_text: "This world has tormented us for many Call-Ups, Lord Captain. We have finally been given the order to fight back. I wish I could be there."

traits.locale_text: « Ce monde nous a tourmentés lors de nombreuses Mobilisations, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Nous avons enfin reçu l'ordre de riposter. J'aimerais pouvoir en être. »
